name: bun-install
description: Install command packages from a local Bun workspace into Bun's global package store.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.publish:next: bun run check && bun publish --tag next
scripts.publish:latest: bun run check && bun publish --tag latest
scripts.release: bun run check && git push --follow-tags origin $(git branch --show-current)
scripts.version:patch: bun run check && bun pm version patch
scripts.version:minor: bun run check && bun pm version minor
scripts.version:major: bun run check && bun pm version major
scripts.version:prerelease: bun run check && bun pm version prerelease
